channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: As Bible sales boom, so does Christian tech
item.description: Want to know the Bible’s stance on technology? There’s an AI chatbot for that. Just a few years ago, experts were predicting a mass decline of Christianity. The percentage of Americans identifying as Christian has fallen almost 20 points since 2000, while the population of non-affiliates was rising.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Transparency, efficiency, innovation: The digital transformation of policing in Kazakhstan
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Digital Transformation in Policing: Kazakhstan's Digital Policeman Initiative
item.description: Kazakhstan's Digital Policeman initiative: a shining example of technological innovation in policing, enhancing transparency, efficiency, and trust within communities.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 things you should never tell an AI chatbot
item.description: There are currently no laws governing what artificial intelligence can and cannot do with the information it gathers; here are 10 things to avoid telling AI chatbots to keep yourself safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union are holding a strike at seven of the company’s delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump team affirms he's leader of GOP amid 'President Musk' barbs
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team pushed back against Democratic lawmakers who suggested Elon Musk is the "real leader" of the Republican Party after his aggressive pressure campaign against a stopgap spending measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: DCSA Unveils Plan to Revamp National Background Investigation System
item.description: Defense Counterintelligence and Security Agency (DCSA) has a 18-month roadmap to stabilize the National Background Investigation Service (NBIS) program, focusing on 'agile' development methods.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Anthropic’s LLMs can’t reason, but think they can — even worse, they ignore guardrails
item.description: Anthropic on Wednesday published a study that explored how its large language model (LLM) deals with conflicting ethical requests. The results show that LLMs can still surprise, something that should scare IT execs preparing to trust generative AI (genAI) results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Salt Typhoon: US cybersecurity watchdog urges switch to Signal-like messaging apps
item.description: Using only end-to-end encrypted apps is CISA's main security tip to secure your mobile communication in the wake of the biggest telecom attack in US history.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Massive data breach at federal credit union exposes 240,000 members
item.description: A credit union with over 240,000 members recently revealed it was targeted by cybercriminals, resulting in a data breach that was part of a two-month attack by hackers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google plans on a handy fix for all those duplicate Chrome tabs, but it's only for Android
item.description: Suffering from a massive amount of tabs in your Chrome browser? Google will soon have a fix for that.
item.dc:creator: allisa.james@futurenet.com (Allisa James), TechRadar

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Improved Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses could land in 2025 – with a much requested upgrade
item.description: Meta’s Ray-Ban smart glasses could get a much requested display upgrade – but these aren’t Orion yet.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Ireland embraced data centers that the AI boom needs. Now they're consuming too much of its energy
item.description: Dozens of massive data centers are consuming more electricity than all of the urban homes in Ireland and starting to wear out the warm welcome that brought them here.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How 1 man got scammed in seconds using Google
item.description: Scammers have become skilled at creating convincing fake websites that can easily fool unsuspecting users. The CyberGuy offers tips to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FBI warning: Don't point lasers at mysterious drones
item.description: According to the FBI, pilots of manned aircraft are increasingly in danger of being blinded by lasers.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: 4 gains Big Tech is hoping for in Trump’s second term
item.description: In a string of visits, dinners, calls, monetary pledges, and social media overtures, big tech chiefs—including Apple’s Tim Cook, OpenAI’s Sam Altman, Meta’s Mark Zuckerberg, SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son, and Amazon’s Jeff Bezos—have joined a parade of business and world leaders in trying to improve thei
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2
item.description: Army PEO C3N is obtaining industry feedback as part of its market research as it develops solicitations for the next generation command and control effort. The post Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI rolls out upgrade to reasoning model, new dev tools
item.description: The release Tuesday by OpenAI of OpenA1 o1, its reasoning model, in API, along with three new sets of tools for developers, is a “smart move that keeps [it] in the corporate/enterprise conversation, as so many customers are shifting their focus towards agentic applications over simpler chat-based ap
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CompTIA launches expert-level cybersecurity certification
item.description: CompTIA this week made available its CompTIA SecurityX certification program, which is an updated version of the CompTIA Advanced Security Practitioner (CASP+) cert and part of CompTIA’s Xpert Series of certifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cupertino: Iconic Flint Center undergoes demolition five years after closing
item.description: The theater where Steve Jobs unveiled the first Macintosh computer in 1984 is reduced to rubble. The Foothill-De Anza Community College District has plans the site.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Lam, The Mercury News
